question.p:
Item 1 : Concept Blaster
Alzheimer's Buzzwords: progressive dementia; tau proteins, neurofibrillary tangles, apolipoprotein E4 allele, narrow gyri

Item 2 : Concept Blaster
Alport's Syndrome Buzzwords: hereditary nephritis with nerve deafness, Type 4 collagen defect; basement membranes

Item 3 : Concept Blaster
Albright's Syndrome Buzzwords: polyostotic fibrous dysplasia, precocious puberty, café au lait spots, short stature, young girls

Item 4 : Concept Blaster
Addison's Disease Buzzwords: primary adrenocortical deficiency

Item 5 : Concept Blaster
Addisonian Anemia Buzzwords: pernicious anemia; antibodies to intrinsic factor or parietal cells; IF; Vit B12; megaloblastic ane

Item 6 : Concept Blaster
Argyll-Robertson Pupil Buzzwords: loss of light reflex constriction (contralateral or bilateral); 'Prostitute's Eye' - accommodates b

Item 7 : Concept Blaster
Arnold-Chiari Malformation Buzzwords: cerebellar tonsil herniation

Item 8 : Concept Blaster
Barrett's Buzzwords: columnar metaplasia of lower esophagus [* risk of adenocarcinoma]

Item 9 : Concept Blaster
Bartter's Syndrome Buzzwords: hyperreninemia

Item 10 : Concept Blaster
Becker's Muscular Dystrophy Buzzwords: similar to Duchenne, but less severe [deficiency in dystrophin protein]

Item 11 : Concept Blaster
Bell's Palsy Buzzwords: CNVII palsy (entire face; recall that UMN lesion only affects lower face)

Item 12 : Concept Blaster
Berger's Disease Buzzwords: IgA nephropathy

Item 13 : Concept Blaster
Bernard-Soulier Disease Buzzwords: defect in platelet adhesion (abnormally large platelets & lack of platelet-surface glycoprotein)

Item 14 : Concept Blaster
Berry Aneurysm Buzzwords: circle of Willis (subarachnoid bleed); often associated with ADPKD

Item 15 : Concept Blaster
Bowen's Disease Buzzwords: carcinoma in situ on shaft of penis (* risk of visceral ca)

Item 16 : Concept Blaster
Briquet's Syndrome Buzzwords: somatization disorder; psychological: multiple physical complaints without physical pathology

Item 17 : Concept Blaster
Broca's Aphasia Buzzwords: Motor Aphasia intact comprehension

Item 18 : Concept Blaster
Bronchiolitis Buzzwords: RSV

Item 19 : Concept Blaster
Brown-Sequard Buzzwords: hemisection of cord (contralateral loss of pain & temp / ipsilateral loss of fine touch, UMN)

Item 20 : Concept Blaster
Bruton's Disease Buzzwords: X-linked agammaglobinemia

Item 21 : Concept Blaster
Budd-Chiari Buzzwords: post-hepatic venous thrombosis

Item 22 : Concept Blaster
Buerger's Disease Buzzwords: acute inflammation of small, medium arteries * painful ischemia * gangrene

Item 23 : Concept Blaster
Burkitt's Lymphoma Buzzwords: small noncleaved cell lymphoma EBV; 8:14 translocation

Item 24 : Concept Blaster
Caisson Disease Buzzwords: gas emboli

Item 25 : Concept Blaster
Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Buzzwords: Median nerve entrapment

Item 26 : Concept Blaster
Chagas' Disease Buzzwords: Trypansoma infection sleeping disease, cardiomegaly with apical atrophy, achlasia

Item 27 : Concept Blaster
Chediak-Higashi Disease Buzzwords: Phagocyte Deficiency: neutropenia, albinism, cranial & peripheral neuropathy; repeated infections

Item 28 : Concept Blaster
Congenital adrenal hyperplasia Buzzwords: 21-hydroxylase deficiency: virilism, no cortisol, salt loss, hypotension; 11-hydroxylase deficiency:

Item 29 : Concept Blaster
Conn's Syndrome Buzzwords: primary aldosteronism

Item 30 : Concept Blaster
Cori's Disease Buzzwords: glycogen storage disease (debranching enzyme deficiency)

Item 31 : Concept Blaster
Creutzfeldt-Jakob Buzzwords: prion infection * cerebellar & cerebral degeneration

Item 32 : Concept Blaster
Crigler-Najjar Syndrome Buzzwords: congenital hyperbilirubinemia (unconjugated); glucuronyl transferase deficiency

Item 33 : Concept Blaster
Crohn's Buzzwords: IBD; ileocecum, transmural, skip lesions, lymphocytic infiltrate, granulomas; (contrast to UC: limit

Item 34 : Concept Blaster
Croup Buzzwords: Parainfluenza

Item 35 : Concept Blaster
Curling's Ulcer Buzzwords: acute gastric ulcer associated with severe burns

Item 36 : Concept Blaster
Cushing's Buzzwords: Disease: hypercorticism 2* to * ACTH from pituitary (basophilic adenoma); Syndrome: hypercorticism o

Item 37 : Concept Blaster
Cushing's Ulcer Buzzwords: acute gastric ulcer associated with CNS trauma

Item 38 : Concept Blaster
de Quervain's Thyroiditis Buzzwords: self-limiting focal destruction (subacute thyroiditis)

Item 39 : Concept Blaster
DiGeorge's Syndrome Buzzwords: thymic hypoplasia * T-cell deficiency; hypoparathyroidism

Item 40 : Concept Blaster
Down's Syndrome Buzzwords: trisomy 21 or translocation

Item 41 : Concept Blaster
Dressler's Syndrome Buzzwords: Post-MI Fibrinous Pericarditis autoimmune

Item 42 : Concept Blaster
Dubin-Johnson Syndrome Buzzwords: congenital hyperbilirubinemia (conjugated); striking brown-to-black discoloration of the liver

Item 43 : Concept Blaster
Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy Buzzwords: deficiency of dystrophin protein * MD X-linked recessive

Item 44 : Concept Blaster
Edwards' Syndrome Buzzwords: trisomy 18; rocker-bottom feet, low ears, heart disease

Item 45 : Concept Blaster
Ehler's-Danlos Buzzwords: defective collagen

Item 46 : Concept Blaster
Eisenmenger's Complex Buzzwords: late cyanotic shunt (R?L) pulmonary HTN & RVH 2? to long-standing VSD, ASD, or PDA

Item 47 : Concept Blaster
Erb-Duchenne Palsy Buzzwords: trauma to superior trunk of brachial plexus Waiter's Tip

Item 48 : Concept Blaster
Ewing Sarcoma Buzzwords: undifferentiated round cell tumor of bone

Item 49 : Concept Blaster
Eyrthroplasia of Queyrat Buzzwords: carcinoma in situ on glans penis

Item 50 : Concept Blaster
Fanconi's Syndrome Buzzwords: impaired proximal tubular reabsorption 2* to lead poisoning or Tetracycline (glycosuria, hyperphosp

Item 51 : Concept Blaster
Felty's Syndrome Buzzwords: rheumatoid arthritis, neutropenia, splenomegaly

Item 52 : Concept Blaster
Gardner's Syndrome Buzzwords: adenomatous polyps of colon plus osteomas & soft tissue tumors

Item 53 : Concept Blaster
Gaucher's Disease Buzzwords: Lysosomal Storage Disease glucocerebrosidase deficiency; hepatosplenomegaly, femoral head & long bo

Item 54 : Concept Blaster
Gilbert's Syndrome Buzzwords: benign congenital hyperbilirubinemia (unconjugated)

Item 55 : Concept Blaster
GIST Buzzwords: Tumor arising in cells of Cajal (pacemakers of gut)

Item 56 : Concept Blaster
Glanzmann's Thrombasthenia Buzzwords: defective glycoproteins on platelets

Item 57 : Concept Blaster
Goodpasture's Buzzwords: autoimmune: ab's to glomerular & alveolar basement membranes; linear immunofluorescence

Item 58 : Concept Blaster
Grave's Disease Buzzwords: autoimmune hyperthyroidism (TSI)

Item 59 : Concept Blaster
Guillain-Barre Buzzwords: idiopathic polyneuritis (ascending muscle weakness & paralysis; usually self-limiting)

Item 60 : Concept Blaster
Hamman-Rich Syndrome Buzzwords: idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis

Item 61 : Concept Blaster
Hand-Schuller-Christian Buzzwords: chronic progressive histiocytosis

Item 62 : Concept Blaster
Hashimoto's Thyroiditis Buzzwords: autoimmune hypothyroidism (antimicrosomal or antithyroglobulin); Hurthle cells, thyroid germinal cen

Item 63 : Concept Blaster
Hashitoxicosis Buzzwords: initial hyperthyroidism in Hashimoto's Thyroiditis that precedes hypothyroidism

Item 64 : Concept Blaster
Henoch-Schonlein purpura Buzzwords: hypersensivity vasculitis; hemmorhagic urticaria (with fever, arthralgias, GI & renal involvement);

Item 65 : Concept Blaster
Hereditary Spherocytosis Buzzwords: RBC cytoskeletin defect, most commonly spectrin

Item 66 : Concept Blaster
Hirschprung's Disease Buzzwords: aganglionic megacolon

Item 67 : Concept Blaster
Horner's Syndrome Buzzwords: ptosis, miosis, anhidrosis (lesion of cervical sympathetic nerves often 2* to a Pancoast tumor)

Item 68 : Concept Blaster
Huntington's Buzzwords: progressive degeneration of caudate nucleus, putamen & frontal cortex; AD

Item 69 : Concept Blaster
Hunter's Buzzwords: Decreased iduronosulfate sulfatase

Item 70 : Concept Blaster
Hurler's Buzzwords: Decreased alpha-L-iduronidase

Item 71 : Concept Blaster
Jacksonian Seizures Buzzwords: epileptic events originating in the primary motor cortex (area 4)

Item 72 : Concept Blaster
Job's Syndrome Buzzwords: immune deficiency: neutrophils fail to respond to chemotactic stimuli

Item 73 : Concept Blaster
Kaposi Sarcoma Buzzwords: malignant vascular tumor (HHV8 in homosexual men)

Item 74 : Concept Blaster
Kartagener's Syndrome Buzzwords: immotile cilia 2? to defective dynein arms infection, situs inversus, sterility

Item 75 : Concept Blaster
Kawasaki Disease Buzzwords: mucocutaneous lymph node syndrome (lips, oral mucosa)

Item 76 : Concept Blaster
Keratoconjunctivitis Buzzwords: adenovirus

Item 77 : Concept Blaster
Klinefelter's Syndrome Buzzwords: 47, XXY

Item 78 : Concept Blaster
Kluver-Bucy Buzzwords: bilateral lesions of amygdala (hypersexuality; oral behavior)

Item 79 : Concept Blaster
Krabbe Disease Buzzwords: Beta-galactosidase deficiency

Item 80 : Concept Blaster
Krukenberg Tumor Buzzwords: adenocarcinoma with signet-ring cells (typically originating from the stomach) metastases to the ova

Item 81 : Concept Blaster
Laennec's Cirrhosis Buzzwords: alcoholic cirrhosis

Item 82 : Concept Blaster
Lesch-Nyhan Buzzwords: HGPRT deficiency; gout, retardation, self-mutilation

Item 83 : Concept Blaster
Letterer-Siwe Buzzwords: acute disseminated Langerhans' cell histiocytosis

Item 84 : Concept Blaster
Libman-Sacks Buzzwords: endocarditis with small vegetations on valve leaflets; associated with SLE

Item 85 : Concept Blaster
Lou Gehrig's Buzzwords: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis degeneration of upper & lower motor neurons

Item 86 : Concept Blaster
Mallory-Weis Syndrome Buzzwords: bleeding from esophagogastric lacerations 2* to wretching (alcoholics)

Item 87 : Concept Blaster
Marfan's Buzzwords: elastin defect, floppy mitral valve, arachnodactyly, cystic medial necrosis, subluxed lens, fibrilli

Item 88 : Concept Blaster
McArdle's Disease Buzzwords: glycogen storage disease (muscle phosphorylase deficiency)

Item 89 : Concept Blaster
Meckel's Diverticulum Buzzwords: rule of 2's: 2 inches long, 2 feet from the ileocecum, in 2% of the population; embryonic duct origi

Item 90 : Concept Blaster
Meig's Syndrome Buzzwords: Triad: ovarian fibroma, ascites, hydrothorax

Item 91 : Concept Blaster
Menetrier's Disease Buzzwords: giant hypertrophic gastritis (enlarged rugae; plasma protein loss)

Item 92 : Concept Blaster
Monckeberg's Arteriosclerosis Buzzwords: calcification of the media (usually radial & ulnar aa.), pipestem arteries

Item 93 : Concept Blaster
Munchausen Syndrome Buzzwords: factitious disorder (consciously creates symptoms, but doesn't know why)

Item 94 : Concept Blaster
Meningioma Buzzwords: Arachnoid cap cells, whorls of cells

Item 95 : Concept Blaster
Mesothelioma Buzzwords: Asbestos exposure

Item 96 : Concept Blaster
Nelson's Syndrome Buzzwords: 1* Adrenal Cushings * surgical removal of adrenals * loss of negative feedback to pituitary * Pituit

Item 97 : Concept Blaster
Niemann-Pick Buzzwords: Lysosomal Storage Disease sphingomyelinase deficiency; 'foamy histiocytes'

Item 98 : Concept Blaster
Osler-Weber-Rendu Syndrome Buzzwords: Hereditary Hemorrhagic Telangiectasia

Item 99 : Concept Blaster
Osteogenesis imperfecta Buzzwords: Type I collagen defect

Item 100 : Concept Blaster
Paget's Disease Buzzwords: abnormal bone architecture (thickened, numerous fractures * pain) , woven and lamellar bone mosaic

Item 101 : Concept Blaster
Pancoast Tumor Buzzwords: bronchogenic tumor with superior sulcus involvement * Horner's Syndrome

Item 102 : Concept Blaster
Parkinson's Buzzwords: dopamine depletion in nigrostriatal tracts; Cogwheel rigidity

Item 103 : Concept Blaster
Peutz-Jegher's Syndrome Buzzwords: melanin pigmentation of lips, mouth, hand, genitalia plus hamartomatous polyps of small intestine

Item 104 : Concept Blaster
Peyronie's Disease Buzzwords: subcutaneous fibrosis of dorsum of penis

Item 105 : Concept Blaster
Pick's Disease Buzzwords: progressive dementia similar to Alzheimer's, knife-edged gyri

Item 106 : Concept Blaster
Plummer's Syndrome Buzzwords: hyperthyroidism, nodular goiter, absence of eye signs (Plummer's = Grave's - eye signs)

Item 107 : Concept Blaster
Plummer-Vinson Buzzwords: esophageal webs & iron-deficiency anemia, ? SCCA of esophagus

Item 108 : Concept Blaster
Pompe's Disease Buzzwords: glycogen storage disease (acid maltase deficiency) * cardiomegaly

Item 109 : Concept Blaster
Pott's Disease Buzzwords: tuberculous osteomyelitis of the vertebrae

Item 110 : Concept Blaster
Potter's Complex Buzzwords: renal agenesis * oligohydramnios * hypoplastic lungs, defects in extremities

Item 111 : Concept Blaster
Raynaud's Buzzwords: Disease: recurrent vasospasm in extremities; Phenomenon: 2* to underlying disease (SLE or scleroderm

Item 112 : Concept Blaster
Reiter's Syndrome Buzzwords: urethritis, conjunctivitis, arthritis non-infectious (but often follows infections), HLA-B27, polya

Item 113 : Concept Blaster
Reye's Syndrome Buzzwords: microvesicular fatty liver change & encephalopathy; 2* to aspirin ingestion in children following vi

Item 114 : Concept Blaster
Riedel's Thyroiditis Buzzwords: idiopathic fibrous replacement of thyroid

Item 115 : Concept Blaster
Rotor Syndrome Buzzwords: congenital hyperbilirubinemia (conjugated); similar to Dubin-Johnson, but no discoloration of the li

Item 116 : Concept Blaster
Sezary Syndrome Buzzwords: leukemic form of cutaneous T-cell lymphoma (mycosis fungoides)

Item 117 : Concept Blaster
Shaver's Disease Buzzwords: aluminum inhalation ? lung fibrosis

Item 118 : Concept Blaster
Sheehan's Syndrome Buzzwords: postpartum pituitary necrosis

Item 119 : Concept Blaster
Shy-Drager Buzzwords: parkinsonism with autonomic dysfunction & orthostatic hypotension

Item 120 : Concept Blaster
Simmond's Disease Buzzwords: pituitary cachexia

Item 121 : Concept Blaster
Sipple's Syndrome Buzzwords: MEN type IIa (pheochromocytoma, thyroid medulla, parathyroid)

Item 122 : Concept Blaster
Sjogren's Syndrome Buzzwords: triad: dry eyes, dry mouth, arthritis ? risk of B-cell lymphoma

Item 123 : Concept Blaster
Spitz Nevus Buzzwords: juvenile melanoma (always benign)

Item 124 : Concept Blaster
Stein-Leventhal Buzzwords: polycystic ovary

Item 125 : Concept Blaster
Stevens-Johnson Syndrome Buzzwords: erythema multiforme, fever, malaise, mucosal ulceration (often 2? to infection or sulfa drugs)

Item 126 : Concept Blaster
Struma Ovarii Buzzwords: Thyroid teratoma of ovary

Item 127 : Concept Blaster
Still's Disease Buzzwords: juvenile rheumatoid arthritis (absence of rheumatoid factor)

Item 128 : Concept Blaster
Takayasu's arteritis Buzzwords: aortic arch syndrome; loss of carotid, radial or ulnar pulses

Item 129 : Concept Blaster
Tay-Sachs Buzzwords: gangliosidosis (hexosaminidase A deficiency * GM2 ganglioside)

Item 130 : Concept Blaster
Tetralogy of Fallot Buzzwords: VSD, overriding aorta, Ěpulmonary artery stenosis, Íright ventricular hypertrophy

Item 131 : Concept Blaster
Tourette's Syndrome Buzzwords: involuntary actions, both motor and vocal

Item 132 : Concept Blaster
Turcot's Syndrome Buzzwords: adenomatous polyps of colon plus CNS tumors

Item 133 : Concept Blaster
Turner's Syndrome Buzzwords: 45, XO

Item 134 : Concept Blaster
Typhoid Fever Buzzwords: Bradycardia and in white people rose spots on abdomen

Item 135 : Concept Blaster
Vincent's Infection Buzzwords: 'trench mouth' - acute necrotizing ulcerative gingivitis

Item 136 : Concept Blaster
von Gierke's Disease Buzzwords: glycogen storage disease (G6Pase deficiency)

Item 137 : Concept Blaster
von Hippel-Lindau Buzzwords: hemangioma (or hemangioblastoma); adenomas of the viscera, especially renal cell carcinoma; defect i

Item 138 : Concept Blaster
von Recklinghausen's Buzzwords: neurofibromatosis & café au lait spots & Lisch nodule (iris hamartomas)

Item 139 : Concept Blaster
von Recklinghausen's Disease of Bone Buzzwords: osteitis fibrosa cystica ('brown tumor') 2* to hyperparathyroidism

Item 140 : Concept Blaster
von Willebrand's Disease Buzzwords: defect in platelet adhesion 2* to deficiency in vWF; increased bleeding time and PTT

Item 141 : Concept Blaster
Waldenstrom's macroglobinemia Buzzwords: proliferation of IgM-producing lymphoid cells

Item 142 : Concept Blaster
Wallenberg's Syndrome Buzzwords: Posterior Inferior Cerebellar Artery (PICA) thrombosis 'Medullary Syndrome'; Ipsilateral: ataxia,

Item 143 : Concept Blaster
Waterhouse-Friderichsen Buzzwords: catastrophic adrenal insufficiency 2* to hemorrhagic necrosis (eg, DIC); often 2* to meningiococcemi

Item 144 : Concept Blaster
Weber's Syndrome Buzzwords: Paramedian Infarct of Midbrain; Ipsilateral: mydriasis; Contralateral: UMN paralysis (lower face & b

Item 145 : Concept Blaster
Wegener's Granulomatosis Buzzwords: necrotizing granulomatous vasculitis of paranasal sinuses, lungs, kidneys, etc.

Item 146 : Concept Blaster
Weil's Disease Buzzwords: leptospirosis

Item 147 : Concept Blaster
Wermer's Syndrome Buzzwords: MEN type I (thyroid, parathyroid, adrenal cortex, pancreatic islets, pituitary)

Item 148 : Concept Blaster
Wernicke's Aphasia Buzzwords: Sensory Aphasia impaired comprehension

Item 149 : Concept Blaster
Wernicke-Korsakoff Syndrome Buzzwords: thiamine deficiency in alcoholics; bilateral mamillary bodies (confusion, ataxia, ophthalmoplegia)

Item 150 : Concept Blaster
Whipple's Disease Buzzwords: malabsorption syndrome (with bacteria-laden macrophages) & polyarthritis

Item 151 : Concept Blaster
Wilson's Disease Buzzwords: hepatolenticular degeneration (copper accumulation & decrease in ceruloplasmin)

Item 152 : Concept Blaster
Wiskott-Aldrich Syndrome Buzzwords: immunodeficiency: combined B- &T-cell deficiency (thrombocytopenia & eczema)

Item 153 : Concept Blaster
Wolff-Chaikoff Effect Buzzwords: high iodine level (*)'s thyroid hormone synthesis

Item 154 : Concept Blaster
Zenker's Diverticulum Buzzwords: esophageal; cricopharyngeal muscles above UES

Item 155 : Concept Blaster
Zollinger-Ellison Buzzwords: gastrin-secreting tumor of pancreas (or intestine) * * acid * intractable ulcers
